messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill as required before doing anything else.

Now loading the report-analyzer skill:





Now I will analyze the document from the provided URL and generate the 8 structured BloomCell analysis objects based on the report-analyzer skill framework.

The document is: **"1 LZ Phone Call 12.16.2020 _Redacted.pdf"** — a redacted clinical phone call note. Using the BloomCell framework, I'll generate the 8-object structured analysis output. Since this is a clinical note/phone call document (not a standard lab panel), I'll apply the framework to extract and structure the available clinical data.

Here is the analyzed output — 8 structured JSON objects:



Now storing each merged record in CosmosDB. Starting with Record 1:Record 1 saved ✅. Now storing Record 2:Record 2 saved ✅. Now storing Record 3:Record 3 saved ✅. Now storing Record 4:Record 4 saved ✅. Now storing Record 5:Record 5 saved ✅. Now storing Record 6:Record 6 saved ✅. Now storing Record 7:Record 7 saved ✅. Now storing Record 8:All 8 records saved ✅.

8 records saved successfully.

Now proceeding to Step 6 — updating the original PatientDocument record:



Document updated successfully.
